Name: PLAYER_COMMON_PARAM
Description: Defines core player movement, combat input timing, stamina/motion behavior, and various gameplay tuning values affecting player controls and interactions.

Fields.Name: Parallel Movement Input Sensitivity Max [%]
Fields.Description: Maximum input sensitivity threshold for parallel (strafe) movement.

Fields.Name: Parallel Movement Input Hold Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time window required to trigger parallel movement behavior.

Fields.Name: Dodge Input Window [sec]
Fields.Description: Time window in which dodge input is recognized.

Fields.Name: Dash Duration [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration the player remains in dash finish state.

Fields.Name: Dash Cooldown Interval [sec]
Fields.Description: Minimum time between consecutive dash actions.

Fields.Name: Post-Dash Movement Input Sensitivity Max [%]
Fields.Description: Maximum input sensitivity allowed after dash ends.

Fields.Name: Post-Dash Movement Duration [sec]
Fields.Description: Time window for movement control after dash ends.

Fields.Name: Minimum Jump Speed [m/s]
Fields.Description: Minimum movement speed required to trigger a jump.

Fields.Name: Maximum Standing Jump Speed [m/s]
Fields.Description: Maximum speed at which a standing jump can be triggered.

Fields.Name: Idle/Walk Turn Trigger Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Minimum input angle required to trigger sharp turning while idle or walking.

Fields.Name: Jog Turn Trigger Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Minimum input angle required to trigger sharp turning while jogging.

Fields.Name: Dash Turn Trigger Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Minimum input angle required to trigger sharp turning while dashing.

Fields.Name: Turn Walk Speed Modifier [%]
Fields.Description: Speed percentage applied during sharp turns while walking or idle.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Walk Turn Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Minimum turn angle after attack when transitioning to walking.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Jog Turn Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Minimum turn angle after attack when transitioning to jogging.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Dash Turn Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Minimum turn angle after attack when transitioning to dashing.

Fields.Name: Post-Attack Turn Speed Modifier [%]
Fields.Description: Speed modifier applied during turning after attacking.

Fields.Name: Ladder Grasp Max Horizontal Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Maximum angle at which the player can grab a ladder horizontally.

Fields.Name: Ladder Grasp Max Vertical Height [m]
Fields.Description: Maximum vertical distance for initiating a ladder grab.

Fields.Name: Ladder Grasp Input Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time required to hold input to initiate ladder grab.

Fields.Name: Ladder Grasp Time Limit [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum time allowed to complete ladder grab input.

Fields.Name: Ladder Movement Input Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Input duration required to start moving on a ladder.

Fields.Name: Ladder Fall Input Window [sec]
Fields.Description: Input window for triggering ladder fall action.

Fields.Name: Near-Death Animation Max Blend HP [%]
Fields.Description: HP percentage at which near-death animation blending reaches maximum intensity.

Fields.Name: Near-Death Animation Min Blend HP [%]
Fields.Description: HP percentage at which near-death animation blending begins.

Fields.Name: Input Buffer Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration that input commands are stored for buffered execution.

Fields.Name: Flick Input Hold Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Duration flick inputs remain valid.

Fields.Name: Flick Input Detection Frames
Fields.Description: Number of frames used to detect flick input.

Fields.Name: Flick Input Strength Threshold
Fields.Description: Minimum input strength required to register a flick.

Fields.Name: Flick Neutral Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time input must remain neutral between flicks.

Fields.Name: Flick Input Max Angle [deg]
Fields.Description: Maximum angle allowed for flick input detection.

Fields.Name: Revive Confirmation Input Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Time required to confirm revival input.

Fields.Name: Two-Handed Weapon Input Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Input window required to switch to two-handed mode.

Fields.Name: Dash Attack Minimum Speed [m/s]
Fields.Description: Minimum speed required to trigger a dash attack.

Fields.Name: Dash Attack Min Speed Animation Scale
Fields.Description: Animation speed multiplier at minimum dash attack speed.

Fields.Name: Dash Attack Max Speed Animation Scale
Fields.Description: Animation speed multiplier at maximum dash attack speed.

Fields.Name: Auto Pivot Neutral Time
Fields.Description: Time required in neutral state before auto-rotation triggers.

Fields.Name: Auto Pivot Input Time
Fields.Description: Input duration required to trigger automatic pivot rotation.

Fields.Name: Dash Blend Weight Max
Fields.Description: Maximum blending weight applied during dash transitions.

Fields.Name: Dash Blend In Speed
Fields.Description: Speed at which dash blending transitions in.

Fields.Name: Dash Blend Out Speed
Fields.Description: Speed at which dash blending transitions out.

Fields.Name: Dash Blend In Walk Speed Threshold [m/s]
Fields.Description: Movement speed threshold for enabling dash blending during walking.

Fields.Name: Dash Blend In Lock-On Walk Speed Threshold [m/s]
Fields.Description: Movement speed threshold for dash blending while locked on.

Fields.Name: Quick Stop Speed Threshold [m/s]
Fields.Description: Speed at which quick stopping behavior is triggered.

Fields.Name: Quick Stop Delay [sec]
Fields.Description: Delay before quick stop is applied.

Fields.Name: Equipment Durability Loss Rate Min [x]
Fields.Description: Minimum multiplier for equipment durability loss.

Fields.Name: Equipment Durability Loss Rate Max [x]
Fields.Description: Maximum multiplier for equipment durability loss.

Fields.Name: Torch Fire Switch Height [m]
Fields.Description: Height threshold for switching torch ignition animation.

Fields.Name: No-Target Attack Upper Angle Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum upward angle for attacks without a target.

Fields.Name: No-Target Attack Lower Angle Limit
Fields.Description: Maximum downward angle for attacks without a target.

Fields.Name: Torch Initial Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Initial duration added when torch is first ignited.

Fields.Name: Torch Additional Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Additional time added per torch refill or extension.

Fields.Name: Torch Maximum Time [sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum duration the torch can remain lit.

Fields.Name: Dark Attack Scaling (Weapon INT %)
Fields.Description: Contribution of Intelligence to dark attack power via weapons.

Fields.Name: Dark Attack Scaling (Weapon FTH %)
Fields.Description: Contribution of Faith to dark attack power via weapons.

Fields.Name: Dark Magic Scaling (INT %)
Fields.Description: Intelligence scaling for dark magic attacks.

Fields.Name: Dark Magic Scaling (FTH %)
Fields.Description: Faith scaling for dark magic attacks.

Fields.Name: Dark Miracle Scaling (INT %)
Fields.Description: Intelligence scaling for dark miracle effects.

Fields.Name: Dark Miracle Scaling (FTH %)
Fields.Description: Faith scaling for dark miracle effects.

Fields.Name: Dark Resistance Scaling (INT %)
Fields.Description: Intelligence contribution to dark resistance.

Fields.Name: Dark Resistance Scaling (FTH %)
Fields.Description: Faith contribution to dark resistance.

Fields.Name: LookAt Rotation Left Limit [deg]
Fields.Description: Maximum left rotation angle for camera/look-at system.

Fields.Name: LookAt Rotation Right Limit [deg]
Fields.Description: Maximum right rotation angle for camera/look-at system.

Fields.Name: LookAt Rotation Upper Limit [deg]
Fields.Description: Maximum upward rotation angle for camera/look-at system.

Fields.Name: LookAt Rotation Lower Limit [deg]
Fields.Description: Maximum downward rotation angle for camera/look-at system.

Fields.Name: LookAt Visibility Side Limit [deg]
Fields.Description: Side angle limit for target visibility detection.

Fields.Name: LookAt Visibility Upper/Lower Limit [deg]
Fields.Description: Vertical angle limit for target visibility detection.

Fields.Name: LookAt Rotation Speed Horizontal [deg/sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum horizontal rotation speed for look-at system.

Fields.Name: LookAt Rotation Speed Vertical [deg/sec]
Fields.Description: Maximum vertical rotation speed for look-at system.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 1
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 1.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 2
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 2.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 3
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 3.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 4
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 4.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 5
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 5.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 6
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 6.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 7
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 7.

Fields.Name: Item Drop Adjustment Round 8
Fields.Description: Drop rate adjustment multiplier for New Game cycle 8.

Fields.Name: Equipment Durability Cover Rate [x]
Fields.Description: Multiplier applied when durability loss is partially covered.

Fields.Name: Wall Detection Height [m]
Fields.Description: Maximum height used for wall collision detection.

Fields.Name: Repair Cost Increase Rate
Fields.Description: Multiplier for increasing equipment repair costs.

Fields.Name: Shield Cut Bonus: S
Fields.Description: Damage reduction bonus multiplier for S-grade shields.

Fields.Name: Shield Cut Bonus: A
Fields.Description: Damage reduction bonus multiplier for A-grade shields.

Fields.Name: Shield Cut Bonus: B
Fields.Description: Damage reduction bonus multiplier for B-grade shields.

Fields.Name: Shield Cut Bonus: C
Fields.Description: Damage reduction bonus multiplier for C-grade shields.

Fields.Name: Shield Cut Bonus: D
Fields.Description: Damage reduction bonus multiplier for D-grade shields.

Fields.Name: Shield Cut Bonus: E
Fields.Description: Damage reduction bonus multiplier for E-grade shields.

Fields.Name: Melee Hit Durability Loss
Fields.Description: Durability reduction when performing melee attacks.

Fields.Name: Guard Durability Loss
Fields.Description: Durability reduction when blocking attacks.

Fields.Name: Ranged Attack Durability Loss
Fields.Description: Durability reduction when firing ranged weapons.

Fields.Name: Melee Projectile Durability Loss
Fields.Description: Durability reduction when melee attacks spawn projectiles.

Fields.Name: Backstab Damage Rate
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for player backstabs.

Fields.Name: Parry Break Stab Damage Rate
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for attacks following a successful parry break.

Fields.Name: Guard Break Stab Damage Rate
Fields.Description: Damage multiplier for attacks following a guard break.
